style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;fontSize=18;" value="<div><ol type="1" style="direction: ltr; unicode-bidi: embed; margin-top: 0in; margin-bottom: 0in; font-family: Calibri;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">State Transition Conditions:</font></ol><ol type="1" style="direction: ltr; unicode-bidi: embed; margin-top: 0in; margin-bottom: 0in; font-family: Calibri;"><ol type="1" style="direction: ltr; unicode-bidi: embed; margin-top: 0in; margin-bottom: 0in;"> <li value="1" style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If left QRD sees white, LF Turn Left</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If center QRD sees white, LF Drive Forward</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If in lander and sees front or has gone enough distance, satellite</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If ball collect photodiode goes high, ball collect</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">Ifall QRDs black and wall on left, Canyon Drive Forward</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If right QRD sees white, LF Turn Right</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If ball collected and center QRD sees white, LF Drive Forward</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If center QRD sees white, LF Drive Forward</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If ball collected and center QRD does not see white, LF Turn Right&nbsp;</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If the QRDs see white and left sharp sees a wall, LF Turn Left</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If three QRDs see white, LF Turn left</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If ball returned and three QRDs see white, LF Turn Left</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If ball returned and three QRDs see white, LF Turn Right</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If center QRD sees line and left SHARP sees wall, Ball Return</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If three QRDs see white and left SHARP does not see wall, LF Turn Right</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If has made 90 deg turn, Canyon Drive Forward</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If front SHARP sees wall and left SHARP sees wall, Canyon Turn Right</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If front SHARP sees wall and left SHARP does not see wall, Canyon Turn Left</font></li> <li style="margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; vertical-align: middle;"><font style="font-size: 21px;">If has made 90 deg turn, Canyon Drive Forward&nbsp;</font></li><br></ol></ol></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="320" width="810" x="80" y="830" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="IhJz3VbnfCeNLClYyZtP-114" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size: 30px;">Bobbi's Finite State Machine:</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="460" x="-35" y="-130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

li.font: If left QRD sees white, LF Turn Left
If center QRD sees white, LF Drive Forward
If in lander and sees front or has gone enough distance, satellite
If ball collect photodiode goes high, ball collect
Ifall QRDs black and wall on left, Canyon Drive Forward
If right QRD sees white, LF Turn Right
If ball collected and center QRD sees white, LF Drive Forward
If center QRD sees white, LF Drive Forward
If ball collected and center QRD does not see white, LF Turn Right
If the QRDs see white and left sharp sees a wall, LF Turn Left
If three QRDs see white, LF Turn left
If ball returned and three QRDs see white, LF Turn Left
If ball returned and three QRDs see white, LF Turn Right
If center QRD sees line and left SHARP sees wall, Ball Return
If three QRDs see white and left SHARP does not see wall, LF Turn Right
If has made 90 deg turn, Canyon Drive Forward
If front SHARP sees wall and left SHARP sees wall, Canyon Turn Right
If front SHARP sees wall and left SHARP does not see wall, Canyon Turn Left
If has made 90 deg turn, Canyon Drive Forward
